summary: WIN-062 detail_evidence Tesla velocity discrepancy made explicit via PATCH-303-D. Two new sentences now state: (a) Tesla 471,240 km/s ÷ 299,792 km/s ≈ 1.5719c (not the dome's 1.574c), (b) the ~0.13% offset is what re-expressing the round-trip against the dome's fitted disc_diameter (40,030 km = 2 × disc_radius 20,015 km) produces, (c) the "1.574c" is therefore a parameter-fit re-derivation, not a quotation. Surfaces the post-hoc-fit fingerprint without changing any verdict.
